title: Update metadata hotfix
summary: Forge v2.0.2 fixes the update path so legacy skill installs report the real v2 package version and show current patch notes after refreshing.
highlights: $forge-update now resolves the installed Forge package from the personal Codex marketplace before printing the update summary.
Version detection now prefers the `VERSION` file when it is newer than the plugin manifest.
Legacy skill installs no longer report stale `1.34.1` patch notes after refreshing to the v2 package.
The v2 multi-agent coordination features from 2.0.0/2.0.1 remain unchanged.
